HERMIT-OLD_LOCKET.title: Old Locket
HERMIT-OLD_LOCKET.description: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Memento[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HERMIT-RYE_STALK.title: Rye Stalk
HERMIT-RYE_STALK.flavor: Still in mint condition, despite being chewed on for so long.
HERMIT-RYE_STALK.description: At the start of turn [blue]{Turn}[/blue], gain [blue]{RuggedPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Rugged[/gold].
HERMIT-SHOTGLASS.title: Shotglass
HERMIT-SHOTGLASS.flavor: Any liquid placed inside changes into something else.
HERMIT-SHOTGLASS.description: The first {Limit:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you use a potion each combat, gain a random potion. You can only use [blue]{Limit} [/blue]{Limit:plural:potion|potions} each combat.
HERMIT-HORSESHOE.title: Horseshoe
HERMIT-HORSESHOE.flavor: Lucky charm. Somebody is gonna be missing this.
HERMIT-HORSESHOE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] less.
HERMIT-SPYGLASS.title: Spyglass
HERMIT-RED_SCARF.title: Red Scarf
HERMIT-RED_SCARF.description: Whenever you apply a new debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMIT-DENTED_PLATE.title: Dented Plate
HERMIT-DENTED_PLATE.flavor: Several bullets are still lodged inside.
HERMIT-DENTED_PLATE.description: While your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card at the start of your turn.
HERMIT-PET_GHOST.title: Pet Ghost
HERMIT-PET_GHOST.description: Prevent your first lethal HP loss each combat.
HERMIT-CHARRED_GLOVE.title: Charred Glove
HERMIT-CHARRED_GLOVE.flavor: Parts of the glove still glow with otherworldly cinders.
HERMIT-CHARRED_GLOVE.description: Whenever you draw or create a Curse, gain [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
HERMIT-CLASPED_LOCKET.title: Clasped Locket
HERMIT-CLASPED_LOCKET.description:
First time you draw a curse each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards.
Upon pickup, obtain [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [gold]Injuries[/gold].
HERMIT-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.title: Straight Razor
HERMIT-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.description: Whenever you remove or [gold]Transform[/gold] a card from your deck, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
HERMIT-BRASS_TACKS.title: Brass Tacks
HERMIT-BRASS_TACKS.flavor: The luster on these tacks never seems to fade.
HERMIT-BRASS_TACKS.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] Block.
HERMIT-BLACK_POWDER.title: Black Powder
HERMIT-BLACK_POWDER.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HERMIT-BROKEN_TOOTH.title: Broken Tooth
HERMIT-BROKEN_TOOTH.flavor: Appears too large to have come from a human jaw...
HERMIT-BROKEN_TOOTH.description: Whenever you defeat an Elite encounter, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP and gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] gold.
